title: PersonaVLM: Long-Term Personalized Multimodal LLMs
evidence_location: PDF text cache, no reliable page map

high_rated_dimensions.reason: The paper frames long-term multimodal personalization as a combined memory, reasoning, and response-alignment problem, which is useful for mapping human-AI interaction and personalization literature.
It defines a long-term personalization setting where preferences and personality evolve across multimodal interactions.
It introduces Persona-MME with over 2,000 cases, seven dimensions, and 14 fine-grained tasks for long-term personalization evaluation.
The paper emphasizes multi-turn interaction, memory updates, evolving preference, and personality alignment rather than static single-turn personalization.
It connects proactive remembering, multi-step reasoning, and response alignment as three capabilities for personalized MLLM agents.

risk_or_uncertainty: Quick-read is based on extracted PDF text; detailed ablation logic and full benchmark tables require deep reading or layout/table verification.
